channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic's Fable model is back. But U.S. AI policy is still a mess
item.description: The U.S. government has lifted export controls on Fable and Mythos, but clarity on future AI model regulations remains elusive.

item.title: Scott Bessent goes after the top Mexican cartel's new billion-dollar business: gas stations
item.description: Treasury sanctioned two men and nine firms linked to a Jalisco cartel fuel-theft ring that reportedly nets tens of millions annually across 21 Mexican states.

item.title: The sports economy is unaffordable at the bar, let alone the stadium
item.description: New data shows fans are going into debt for tickets, and one in five cannot even afford to watch at a sports bar.

item.title: Trump freezes funding for New York's Medicaid Fraud Control Unit amid fraud fight
item.description: Days after DOJ praised New York's Medicaid unit for a major bust, HHS cut its funding the same week it named the state a partner.
